data.name: MiniShopping
data.description: This is an e-commerce application, built with Java, Android Studio, and Django.

data.name: Analyzing and Predicting the Success of a SpaceX's landing
data.description: A final project on IBM Data Science Professional Certificate, using Exploratory Data Analysis to explore data features, visualization tools to have a pictorial view of data, then use Support Vector Machine, Classification Trees, and Logistic Regression to make decision. You can visit project by:

data.name: Analyzing Historical Stock/Revenue Data and Building a Dashboard
data.description: Extract the revenue data for Tesla and GameStop, then build a dashboard to compare the price of stocks versus the revenue, help to make decision. You can visit project by:

data.name: PC Control via Email
data.description: A program that allows users to remotely control their computers using their emails, by sending mails to a specific mail address, they can require their computers to capture screenshots, turn on/turn off a process, keylog, shutdown, restart their computers, etc. This app is implemented using concepts of socket programming.

data.name: Research about Hidden Markov Model
data.description: A brief research on Hidden Markov Model, a statistical model, famous in Natural Language Processing and also has use in Machine Learning, with theory, implementation and its application.

data.name: NOAA Weather Data Processing
data.description: A project for data visualization with matplotlib, data description, and data prediction using Regression model, on a small dataset extracted from NOAA's weather data.
